turns.user: 5 bài báo hôm nay về openAI
turns.assistant_text:
Here are 5 recent articles about OpenAI:

1. **[OpenAI offers rival AI to UK banks blocked from Claude Mythos - BBC](https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cm2p3j6lvn7o)**  
   OpenAI has provided nine major UK banks access to its cybersecurity AI tool, GPT-5.5 Cyber, after Anthropic blocked them from using its version, Claude Mythos. Concerns have been raised about the potential risks to financial system security.

2. **[Флорида штати OpenAI ва Sam Altman устидан судга шикоят киритди - Zamin.uz](https://zamin.uz/en/technology/204648-florida-files-lawsuit-against-openai-and-sam-altman.html)**  
   The Florida Attorney General's Office has filed a lawsuit against OpenAI and CEO Sam Altman, alleging negligence in safety measures related to the ChatGPT chatbot's involvement in violent incidents.

3. **[OpenAI hit with lawsuit by Florida AG over AI risks - Politico](https://www.politico.com/news/2026/06/01/openai-hit-with-florida-lawsuit-00944215)**  
   Florida's Attorney General has filed a lawsuit against OpenAI, claiming that ChatGPT poses risks of addiction and suicide, and has allegedly assisted in mass shootings.

4. **[CNBC Exclusive: Transcript: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman Speaks with CNBC’s David Faber on “Power Lunch” Today - CNBC](https://www.cnbc.com/amp/2026/06/01/cnbc-exclusive-transcript-openai-ceo-sam-altman-speaks-with-cnbcs-david-faber-on-power-lunch-today.html)**  
   An exclusive interview with Sam Altman discussing the demand for AI models and their impact on business efficiency and product development.

5. **[OpenAI Is Latest Tech Company In The Litigation Hot Seat - Above the Law](https://abovethelaw.com/2026/06/openai-is-latest-tech-company-in-the-litigation-hot-seat/2/)**  
   OpenAI is facing multiple legal challenges as it navigates the complexities of AI technology and its implications in various sectors.

Let me know if you need anything else!
